# Copilot Instructions for napcat-plugin-censor

This repository is a TypeScript NapCat plugin for group-message moderation. `src/` is the source of truth; `dist/index.mjs` is generated by Vite.

## Architecture

- `src/index.ts`: NapCat lifecycle exports, WebUI static registration, API route registration.
- `src/config.ts`: defaults and NapCat config UI schema.
- `src/core/state.ts`: config persistence, legacy config normalization, stats, group enable rules.
- `src/services/censor-service.ts`: local dictionary loading, remote dictionary fallback, guard API checks.
- `src/handlers/message-handler.ts`: group-message moderation, withdrawals, reports, and auto-ban logic.
- `src/services/api-service.ts`: WebUI API routes.
- `src/webui/`: React WebUI with its own package and lockfile.

## Commands

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm run typecheck
pnpm run build
```

`pnpm run typecheck` runs both the plugin and the nested WebUI checks. `pnpm run build` builds the WebUI first, then bundles `src/index.ts` into `dist/index.mjs` and copies dictionary assets.

## Conventions

- Keep runtime logic in TypeScript under `src/`; do not hand-edit generated `dist/` output.
- Keep NapCat runtime types narrow in `src/napcat.ts`; avoid importing from `napcat-types` because the published package includes invalid source files.
- Treat `dictionary.txt` and `dictionary.b64` as release assets. Build output should copy both into `dist/`.
- Preserve legacy config compatibility for `maxAgainst`, `banDuration`, `sendTime`, and `filterMsg`.
